weeChess.title: WeeChess Privacy Policy
weeChess.section1Text: WeeChess is a mobile game application for solving chess puzzles. This privacy policy explains the data processing of the application and the third-party services used. By using our application, you are deemed to have accepted this policy.
weeChess.section2Text: WeeChess does not directly collect or store personal data belonging to the user in its own database. However, within the scope of application functionality, third-party services such as Apple Game Center, Google Play Games, Google AdMob, Firebase, Sentry, and GlitchTip are used. These services may process data such as device identifiers (IDFA/GAID), IP addresses, and app usage statistics in accordance with their own privacy policies.
weeChess.section2_1Text: Puzzles in the application can be liked and disliked. Only the total number of likes and dislikes for each puzzle is kept within the application. Information about which user liked or disliked which puzzle is not stored in any way, and this data is not matched with a personal identity.
weeChess.section3Text: Trusted third-party services are used for features such as advertising, in-app purchases, scores, leaderboards, analysis, and error tracking within the application.
weeChess.section3_1Text: Ads are shown via Google AdMob. Advertising identifiers and similar data may be processed by Google for the purpose of showing and measuring ads.
weeChess.section3_1_1Text: For users in the European Economic Area (EEA) and the UK, GDPR-compliant consent management (User Messaging Platform - UMP) is used. Users can manage their advertising preferences through this system.
weeChess.section3_1_2Text: On iOS devices, Apple's App Tracking Transparency (ATT) system is used for tracking permission for advertising and measurement purposes. Users can change this permission at any time from device settings.
weeChess.section3_2Text: Purchases are made through the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. RevenueCat infrastructure is used to verify purchase status. Payment and invoice information is processed entirely by the relevant platforms; credit card or identity information is not transmitted to the developer.
weeChess.section3_3Title: 3.3 Game Center and Google Play Games (Scores and Leaderboards)
weeChess.section3_3Text: Game progress and leaderboard data are processed by Apple Game Center and Google Play Games. This data is associated with your accounts and is not stored in a separate database by the developer.
weeChess.section3_3Important: IMPORTANT: In order for your purchases and progress to be moved between devices, Game Center (iOS) or Google Play Games (Android) login must be turned on in settings.
weeChess.section3_4Title: 3.4 Analytics and Error Tracking (Firebase, Sentry, and GlitchTip)
weeChess.section3_4Text: Firebase Analytics, Firebase Crashlytics, Sentry, and GlitchTip services are used to improve the performance of the application and to detect errors. These services may collect device information and error reports (stack trace) anonymously.
weeChess.section4Text: WeeChess does not directly process user personal data. The data required for the operation of the application is processed only by the relevant third-party services in accordance with their own policies. Like/dislike data is used only as anonymous totals.
weeChess.section5Text: WeeChess does not share user data with third parties on its own behalf. Processing activities are directly the responsibility of the relevant service providers (Google, Apple, Sentry, etc.).
weeChess.section6Text: WeeChess does not store personal data in its own database. Third-party services provide data security within the framework of their own security standards. Anonymous puzzle like/dislike data is stored as long as the application service continues.
weeChess.section7Text: Users have the right to access, correct, or delete their data. To exercise these rights, you can use the relevant third-party platform settings or contact us.
weeChess.section7Item1: You can manage advertising preferences from "Privacy Preferences" within the application or from device settings.
weeChess.section7Item2: You can manage purchases through the App Store / Play Store.
weeChess.section7Item3: You can control game data from Game Center / Google Play Games settings.
weeChess.section8Text: Cookies and tracking technologies used for advertising and analysis are managed by Google and the relevant service providers.
weeChess.section9Text: I reserve the right to update this privacy policy. Updates take effect as soon as they are published.
weeChess.section10Text: WeeChess does not knowingly collect personal data from children under the age of 13. Our application appeals to a general audience but is also suitable for child users. Parents can supervise their children's use of the application through Apple/Google family settings.
weeChess.section11Text: For your questions and data requests:
weeChess.finalText: By using WeeChess, we assume that you have read and accepted this privacy policy. Good games!
